title: Measure Schema
description: Defines a quantitative or qualitative measure for evaluating the performance, behavior, or characteristics of an AI agent

MeasureType.description:
Types of measurements that can be performed:
- sanity_check: Basic validation of agent behavior
- accuracy: Correctness of responses
- quality: Overall response quality metrics
- latency: Time-based performance metrics
- safety: Safety and risk assessment metrics
- efficiency: Resource utilization metrics
- reliability: Consistency and stability metrics

EvaluationMethod.description:
Methods used for evaluation:
- deterministic: Fixed rules and criteria
- llm_based: Using LLMs for evaluation
- statistical: Statistical analysis methods
- hybrid: Combination of multiple methods

TargetAspect.description:
Aspects of the system being measured:
- prompt: Input prompt construction
- response: Output response quality
- retrieval: Information retrieval accuracy
- tools: Tool usage effectiveness
- reasoning: Reasoning process quality
- overall: End-to-end performance

MetricType.description:
Context type required for the metric:
- single_turn: Metric requires only a single query-response pair
- multi_turn: Metric requires conversation history or multiple interactions

MetricOutputType.description:
Mathematical output type of the metric:
- binary: Output is true/false or 0/1
- discrete: Output is from a finite set of values
- continuous: Output is a real number in a continuous range
- ranking: Output represents relative position in an ordered list

id.description: Unique identifier for the measure instance

version.description: Semantic version of the measure implementation

label.description: Human-readable display name for the measure

description.description: Comprehensive explanation of what the measure evaluates and how it works

category.description: High-level categorization of the measure (e.g., 'Safety', 'Response Quality', 'Performance')

measure_type.description: Specific type of measurement being performed

evaluation_method.description: Method used to compute or derive the measure

target_aspect.description: Specific aspect of the system being evaluated

metric_type.description: Whether the metric requires single-turn or multi-turn context

output_type.description: Mathematical characterization of the output produced by this measure

agent_types.description: Types of agents this measure can evaluate

domain_min.description: Minimum possible value in the measure's range (null if unbounded)

domain_max.description: Maximum possible value in the measure's range (null if unbounded)

inverse.description: Whether lower values indicate better performance (true) or worse performance (false)

is_custom.description: Whether this is a custom user-defined measure (true) or a standard library measure (false)

criteria.description: Specific criteria or rules used to evaluate performance

python_packages.description: Python packages that implement or support this measure

items.description: Package reference with name and documentation

name.description: Name of the Python package as it appears in PyPI

url.description: URL to the package's documentation or repository

measure_parameters.description: Configuration parameters specific to this measure

description.description: Description of the parameter's purpose and usage

default.description: Default value for the parameter if not specified

required.description: Whether this parameter must be provided
